raw: Allows for 2-for-1 ferry fees on weekdays to either Spectacle or Georges Islands. ALL TICKETS MUST BE PURCHASED ONLINE The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island • May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays • June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island • July 15 - September 1: every day • September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays • September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham • June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays • September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
